commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces mtime-based `ensureOpenClawModelsJson` ready-cache inputs with content/outcome hashes, adds `models.json` drift checks and file-mode hardening, and adds focused tests plus proof scripts.

PR surface: Source +496, Tests +463, Other +197. Total +1156 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR reads `auth-profiles.json` while current main persists auth profiles in `openclaw-agent.sqlite` and explicitly ignores legacy JSON at runtime; I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
